module_info.docstring:
Claude Code Agent Farm - Hybrid Orchestrator
Combines simplicity with robust monitoring and automatic agent management

classes.name: AgentMonitor
classes.docstring: Monitors Claude Code agents for health and performance

methods.name: calculate_adaptive_timeout
methods.docstring: Calculate adaptive idle timeout based on median cycle time

methods.name: detect_context_percentage
methods.docstring: Extract context percentage from pane content

methods.name: is_claude_ready
methods.docstring: Check if Claude Code is ready for input

methods.name: is_claude_working
methods.docstring: Check if Claude Code is actively working

methods.name: has_welcome_screen
methods.docstring: Check if Claude Code is showing the welcome/setup screen

methods.name: has_settings_error
methods.docstring: Check for settings corruption

methods.name: check_agent
methods.docstring: Check status of a single agent

methods.name: _update_pane_title
methods.docstring: Update tmux pane title with agent status and context percentage

methods.name: _update_heartbeat
methods.docstring: Update heartbeat file for an agent

methods.name: _check_heartbeat_age
methods.docstring: Check age of heartbeat file in seconds

methods.name: needs_restart
methods.docstring:
Determine if an agent needs to be restarted and why

Returns:
    None  - no restart needed
    'context' - context nearly exhausted, use /clear
    'error' - encountered errors or heartbeat stalled, full restart
    'idle' - idle for too long, full restart

methods.name: get_status_table
methods.docstring: Generate status table for all agents

methods.name: _load_config
methods.docstring: Load settings from JSON config file

methods.name: _signal_handler
methods.docstring: Handle shutdown signals gracefully with force-kill on double tap

methods.name: _backup_claude_settings
methods.docstring: Backup essential Claude Code settings (excluding large caches)

methods.name: _cleanup_old_backups
methods.docstring: Remove old backups, keeping only the most recent ones and enforcing size limit

methods.name: _restore_claude_settings
methods.docstring: Restore Claude Code settings from backup

methods.name: _copy_best_practices_guides
methods.docstring: Copy best practices guides to the project folder if configured

methods.name: _load_prompt
methods.docstring: Load prompt from file and substitute variables

methods.name: _calculate_dynamic_chunk_size
methods.docstring: Calculate optimal chunk size based on remaining lines in the problems file

methods.name: regenerate_problems
methods.docstring: Regenerate the type-checker and linter problems file

methods.name: commit_and_push
methods.docstring: Commit and push the updated problem count

methods.name: _display_commit_diff
methods.docstring: Display a rich diff summary of the last commit

methods.name: _wait_for_shell_prompt
methods.docstring:
Wait for a shell prompt to appear in the pane

Args:
    pane_target: The tmux pane to check
    timeout: Maximum time to wait in seconds
    ignore_shutdown: If True, don't abort on shutdown signal (for error recovery)

methods.name: setup_tmux_session
methods.docstring: Create tmux session with tiled agent panes

methods.name: _acquire_claude_lock
methods.docstring: Acquire a lock file to prevent concurrent Claude Code launches

methods.name: _release_claude_lock
methods.docstring: Release the Claude Code launch lock

methods.name: _check_claude_permissions
methods.docstring: Check and fix permissions on Claude settings files

methods.name: start_agent
methods.docstring: Start or restart a single agent

methods.name: launch_agents
methods.docstring: Launch all agents with staggered start times

methods.name: monitor_loop
methods.docstring: Main monitoring loop with auto-restart capability

methods.name: run
methods.docstring: Main orchestration flow

methods.name: shutdown
methods.docstring: Clean shutdown of all agents

methods.name: _emergency_cleanup
methods.docstring: Emergency cleanup handler for unexpected exits

methods.name: generate_html_report
methods.docstring: Generate single-file HTML run report with all statistics

methods.name: write_monitor_state
methods.docstring: Write current monitor state to shared file

methods.name: _ensure_gitignore_entries
methods.docstring: Add Claude Agent Farm generated artefacts to the project's .gitignore (idempotent)

methods.name: clear_agent_context
methods.docstring:
Send /clear to the specified agent and re-inject the working prompt.

This avoids fully restarting Claude Code, preventing settings races
while still recovering context budget.

functions.name: interruptible_confirm
functions.docstring: Confirmation prompt that returns default on KeyboardInterrupt

functions.name: run
functions.docstring:
Execute shell command with optional output capture

When capture=False, output is streamed to terminal unless quiet=True
When capture=True, output is captured and returned

functions.name: tmux_send
functions.docstring: Send keystrokes to a tmux pane (binary-safe)

functions.name: tmux_capture
functions.docstring: Capture content from a tmux pane

functions.name: main
params: path: str = typer.Option(..., '--path', help='Absolute path to project root', rich_help_panel='Required Arguments')
agents: int = typer.Option(20, '--agents', '-n', help='Number of Claude agents', rich_help_panel='Agent Configuration')
session: str = typer.Option('claude_agents', '--session', '-s', help='tmux session name', rich_help_panel='Agent Configuration')
stagger: float = typer.Option(10.0, '--stagger', help='Seconds between starting agents', rich_help_panel='Timing Configuration')
wait_after_cc: float = typer.Option(15.0, '--wait-after-cc', help='Seconds to wait after launching cc', rich_help_panel='Timing Configuration')
check_interval: int = typer.Option(10, '--check-interval', help='Seconds between agent health checks', rich_help_panel='Timing Configuration')
skip_regenerate: bool = typer.Option(False, '--skip-regenerate', help='Skip regenerating problems file', rich_help_panel='Feature Flags')
skip_commit: bool = typer.Option(False, '--skip-commit', help='Skip git commit/push', rich_help_panel='Feature Flags')
auto_restart: bool = typer.Option(False, '--auto-restart', help='Auto-restart agents on errors/completion', rich_help_panel='Feature Flags')
no_monitor: bool = typer.Option(False, '--no-monitor', help='Disable monitoring (just launch and exit)', rich_help_panel='Feature Flags')
attach: bool = typer.Option(False, '--attach', help='Attach to tmux session after setup', rich_help_panel='Feature Flags')
prompt_file: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, '--prompt-file', help='Path to custom prompt file', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
config: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, '--config', help='Load settings from JSON config file', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
context_threshold: int = typer.Option(20, '--context-threshold', help='Restart agent when context ≤ this percentage', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
idle_timeout: int = typer.Option(60, '--idle-timeout', help='Seconds of inactivity before marking agent as idle', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
max_errors: int = typer.Option(3, '--max-errors', help='Maximum consecutive errors before disabling agent', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
tmux_kill_on_exit: bool = typer.Option(True, '--tmux-kill-on-exit/--no-tmux-kill-on-exit', help='Kill tmux session on exit', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
tmux_mouse: bool = typer.Option(True, '--tmux-mouse/--no-tmux-mouse', help='Enable tmux mouse support', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
fast_start: bool = typer.Option(False, '--fast-start', help='Skip shell prompt checking', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
full_backup: bool = typer.Option(False, '--full-backup', help='Perform a full backup before starting', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
commit_every: Optional[int] = typer.Option(None, '--commit-every', help='Commit after every N regeneration cycles', rich_help_panel='Advanced Options')
functions.docstring:
Claude Code Agent Farm - Parallel code fixing automation

This tool orchestrates multiple Claude Code agents working in parallel
to fix type-checker and linter problems in your codebase.

functions.name: monitor_only
params: path: str = typer.Option(..., '--path', help='Absolute path to project root')
session: str = typer.Option('claude_agents', '--session', '-s', help='tmux session name')
functions.docstring: Run monitor display only - internal command used by the orchestrator

functions.name: doctor
params: path: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, '--path', help='Project path to check (optional)')
functions.docstring: Pre-flight verifier to check system configuration and catch common setup errors

functions.name: command_exists
functions.docstring: Check if a command exists in PATH

functions.name: install_completion
params: shell: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, help='Shell to install completion for. Auto-detected if not provided.')
functions.docstring: Install shell completion for claude-code-agent-farm command
